sn47.27:1.1: The same setting. Sitting to one side, the Venerable Sāriputta said to the Venerable Anuruddha:
sn47.27:1.2: "Friend Anuruddha, it is said, ‘One beyond training, one beyond training.’ In what way, friend, is one beyond training?"
sn47.27:1.3: "It is, friend, because one has completely developed the four establishments of mindfulness that one is beyond training.
sn47.27:2.1: What four? …as above… It is because one has completely developed these four establishments of mindfulness that one is beyond training."
